svg.title: GraphNotes Phase 1 — Frontend and IPC type diagram
svg.desc: Diagram showing TypeScript IPC types (VaultInfo, NoteSummary, NoteRecord, FrontmatterMap), React hooks (useVault, useNote), React components (App, NoteList, Editor stub), and Tauri IPC commands, with relationships between them.
svg.text: Tauri IPC commands registered in main.rs
